Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. interactions.body:
(Borrower GT Rule 1 Email) [RE:You asked us to help with $3000 - and we can!] Hi Gordon, 

Thanks for reaching out, we understand that it can seem difficult to find a cosigner at first. Don't worry though, we help people like you every day!

We're a cosigner lender, all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them. A cosigner is a great sign that someone trusts you, and that we should too regardless of your credit history! If your cosigner trusts you, then we will.

A cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor or even a colleague) who is a US resident, has a 700+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time - someone who owns their home or pays a mortgage is much more likely to be accepted. Remember, as long as you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to make a payment! You might find some useful tips on how to approach finding or speaking to a potential cosigner here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans

When you have found someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/QX9W9TA0 - we'd love for your loan to add to the $100 million we've already paid out to people just like you. If you still find that you're not able to find a cosigner, please respond to this email with CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else.

Thanks, 
Jade@Transform Credit

interactions.body:
Hi KOLBY,

We apologize if you’ve been misinformed about our loans. It’s made clear on our website that we always require a cosigner, which was displayed before you applied and entered any details. The broker would’ve passed you to us if they thought we were the best fit for you, based on your circumstances. Although we can’t directly control the broker’s messaging, we're sure they would’ve had your best interests in mind. 

Transform Credit is a cosigner loan provider; all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them. A cosigner is a great sign to us that someone trusts you and that we should too, no matter what your credit history!

A cosigner's responsibility is to make the loan repayments if the borrower does not.

Unfortunately you will not be able to move ahead without a suitable cosigner.

Please let us know how to proceed?

Thanks,
Transform Credit

[Your TransformCredit Loan Application : 0607100209030115061219] Hi Daniel. 

Thank you for contacting Transform Credit, your message is really important to us. 

We appreciate your feedback, however, I would like to clarify that our loan journey is fully explained on our website, https://transformcredit.com, where we state that any person who is a US resident, aged 18+ with a good history, and able to comfortably afford the repayments on their chosen loans, can borrow up to $7000 with a cosigner, as we do loan based on trust and not on your credit history.

If you decide to apply again in the future, you can use this link: https://rgct.io/s/RDQ9WHT3
 
When you applied for a loan with us, we offered two different products: Loans up to $7000 with a co-signer, and CreditBuilder which is a small loan held on our customer's behalf that customers make monthly interest payments against, building up their credit score.

I can see that you signed up for a Transform CreditBuilder account when applied for a loan of $6000. The transform CreditBuilder helps build your credit, even if you do not borrow from us. 

When you sign up for CreditBuilder, you take the first step in building your score over 24 months. Each month you pay $5, which we report to the Credit Bureaus as interest against a loan that is held on your behalf. These successful payments build up your credit history, helping to improve your score. Once the 24 months have passed, or if you decide to cancel/stop paying, CreditBuilder is simply marked as paid in full. This prevents any missed payments from undoing the positive impact that your on-time payments have on your credit score.

CreditBuilder is a fantastic stepping stone towards seeing the benefits of an improving credit score, without the responsibility of taking on a big financial commitment. When you do find yourself ready, with the help of a co-signer, Transform Credit can still help you access funds of up to $7000 too! At which point, the CreditBuilder loan you have will be paid in full on your behalf.

You can find out more about CreditBuilder here: transformcredit.com/transform-credit-builder/ but I can confirm that I have canceled this now for you, in line with your request. 

I think there may be some confusion between us and another company because we only collected 2 monthly payments of $5 for the time you had your Credit Builder active before requesting to cancel, for a total of $10 not $772.

If you need any more help, please let me know.
 
Have a great day, 
Lori@TransformCredit

interactions.body:
(Appeals Auto Response BRW Email) [RE:Co, signer] Hi Cathy, 

Thanks for contacting Appeals. 

We understand that it can be disheartening when you're struggling to find a suitable cosigner, don't worry though - the most important thing is we've already accepted your application and want to help you.

There are a few reasons we could find someone to be unsuitable - the most common being a less than perfect credit history. It will be up to your cosigner to make any loan payments that you do not, looking at their Experian credit history allows us to check that they can manage this in addition to their existing commitments. If a potential cosigner has missed or late payments, we can't be certain they'd be able to afford the loan payments while maintaining their other accounts. Alternatively, If your potential cosigner's credit file is locked, we won't have been able to confirm either way (they can apply as soon as their credit file is unlocked: https://tcrdt.com/s/L4KSODY3). 

When you're considering who to ask, remember your cosigner must have a 750+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time (homeowners and mortgage payers are more likely to be accepted). It's important to remember that your cosigner can only be on one loan with Together Loans at a time too.

If you've provided someone who is unsure why they weren't accepted, we recommend they check their Experian credit report/score for free at: https://www.experian.com/.

In the meantime, the $3000 will still be reserved for you. We'd love for your loan to add to the $100 million we've already paid out to people just like you. Give this link to your cosigner to register online: https://tcrdt.com/s/L4KSODY3 and feel free to check out our FAQs for further help: https://https://togetherloans.com/faq.

Jade@Together Loans

P.S. I am ready to pay $3000 out within 24 hours of your cosigner being approved, but if you don't plan to provide a new cosigner please let me know by replying CANCEL so I can reserve it for someone else

interactions.body:
(Borrower GT Default Email) [RE:No email address] Hi Michael, 

Here at Together Loans, we only offer cosigner loans. Providing a cosigner means we're able to lend to you, even if your credit score is below 500. If your cosigner trusts you then we will too. Your cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor, colleague or even your in-laws!) who:

- Is a US resident
- Is over 23 
- Has a credit score of more than 700
- Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time.
- Trusts you and will pay if you do not 
- Will give correct contact details and sign the agreement

More information about our cosigner requirements can be found here: https://togetherloans.com/faq. Send this link to your cosigner so they can register online in 2 minutes: https://tcrdt.com/s/21GNZC9D

If you are not able to find a cosigner, please let me know by responding to this email with CANCEL. You can reapply at any time by visiting: https://togetherloans.com

Thanks,
Together Loans

(Appeals Auto Response BRW Email) [RE:Co signer decided] Hi Michael, 

Thanks for contacting Appeals. 

We understand that it can be disheartening when you're struggling to find a suitable cosigner, don't worry though - the most important thing is we've already accepted your application and want to help you.

There are a few reasons we could find someone to be unsuitable - the most common being a less than perfect credit history. It will be up to your cosigner to make any loan payments that you do not, looking at their Experian credit history allows us to check that they can manage this in addition to their existing commitments. If a potential cosigner has missed or late payments, we can't be certain they'd be able to afford the loan payments while maintaining their other accounts. Alternatively, If your potential cosigner's credit file is locked, we won't have been able to confirm either way (they can apply as soon as their credit file is unlocked: https://tcrdt.com/s/DXS4234J). 

When you're considering who to ask, remember your cosigner must have a 750+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time (homeowners and mortgage payers are more likely to be accepted). It's important to remember that your cosigner can only be on one loan with Together Loans at a time too.

If you've provided someone who is unsure why they weren't accepted, we recommend they check their Experian credit report/score for free at: https://www.experian.com/.

In the meantime, the $3000 will still be reserved for you. We'd love for your loan to add to the $100 million we've already paid out to people just like you. Give this link to your cosigner to register online: https://tcrdt.com/s/DXS4234J and feel free to check out our FAQs for further help: https://https://togetherloans.com/faq.

Jade@Together Loans

P.S. I am ready to pay $3000 out within 24 hours of your cosigner being approved, but if you don't plan to provide a new cosigner please let me know by replying CANCEL so I can reserve it for someone else

(Borrower GT Default SMS) Hi Michael, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, and we should too! They can be ANYONE who is a US resident, has 700+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! You'll find tips here: https://togetherloans.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/21GNZC9D - we'd love your loan to add to the +$100 million we've already paid out. If you still can't find a cosigner, please respond CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Jade, Together Loans

(Borrower GT Declined Email) [RE:Co signer decided] Hi Michael,

Unfortunately, your cosigner was declined because they failed to meet the criteria in our underwriting checks. However, this does not mean that you have been declined, and we can still get this loan paid out to you. We just need you to find a suitable cosigner, with strong credit and a history of making repayments on time. You can find helpful information regarding the cosigner requirements here: https://togetherloans.com/faq

Once you have found someone to be your cosigner, please send them this link to apply: https://tcrdt.com/s/DXS4234J

If you are not able to find another cosigner, you can respond with CANCEL to close your application. You can re-apply at any time by visiting: https://togetherloans.com

Thanks,
Together Loans

interactions.body:
[Your Together Loans Loan Application : 0609182924092919120125] REF: Your Experian Dispute Answer CB03415982
Hi MARVIN,
 
We received a dispute from Experian and upon review, we can see that you applied for a loan via the Together Loans website and during the application process, signed up to the CreditBuilder. 

The Credit Builder loan account is offered to everyone that applies with us as a Borrower, it is completely optional, allowing you to opt-in, or continue the original loan application without setting up a CreditBuilder Account.

When you sign up for CreditBuilder, you take the first step in building your score over 1-2 years. Each month you pay $5, which we report to Experian as interest against a loan that is held on your behalf. These successful payments build up your credit history, helping to improve your score. Once the loan term is completed, or if you decide to cancel/stop paying, CreditBuilder is simply marked as paid in full. This prevents any missed payments from undoing the positive impact that your on-time payments have on your credit score.

CreditBuilder is a fantastic stepping stone towards seeing the benefits of an improving credit score, without the responsibility of taking on a big financial commitment. When you do find yourself ready, with the help of a co-signer, Together Loans can help you access funds too! At which point, any CreditBuilder loan you have will be paid in full on your behalf.

How are these payments reported to the Credit Reporting Agencies? Each month you pay $5, which we report to Experian as interest against a loan that is held on your behalf. These successful payments build up your credit history, helping to improve your score. Once the 24 months have passed, or if you decide to cancel/stop paying, CreditBuilder is simply marked as paid in full. This prevents any missed payments from undoing the positive impact that your on-time payments have on your credit score.
 
We confirm that your CreditBuilder Account is already canceled, reported and updated as a closed account, which was successfully paid off in your Credit File.
 
Please remember that you don’t owe us any money for this CreditBuilder account.
 
We will be happy to help you with any other information or further support.
 
Thanks,
Together Loans

interactions.body:
(Appeals Auto Response BRW Email) [RE:Missing Subject] Hi Heather, 

Thanks for contacting Appeals. 

We understand that it can be disheartening when you're struggling to find a suitable cosigner, don't worry though - the most important thing is we've already accepted your application and want to help you.

There are a few reasons we could find someone to be unsuitable - the most common being a less than perfect credit history. It will be up to your cosigner to make any loan payments that you do not, looking at their Experian credit history allows us to check that they can manage this in addition to their existing commitments. If a potential cosigner has missed or late payments, we can't be certain they'd be able to afford the loan payments while maintaining their other accounts. Alternatively, If your potential cosigner's credit file is locked, we won't have been able to confirm either way (they can apply as soon as their credit file is unlocked: https://tcrdt.com/s/JGXIXJQX). 

When you're considering who to ask, remember your cosigner must have a 750+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time (homeowners and mortgage payers are more likely to be accepted). It's important to remember that your cosigner can only be on one TransformCredit loan at a time too.

If you've provided someone who is unsure why they weren't accepted, we recommend they check their Experian credit report/score for free at: https://www.experian.com/.

In the meantime, the $5500 will still be reserved for you. We'd love for your loan to add to the $100 million we've already paid out to people just like you. Give this link to your cosigner to register online: https://tcrdt.com/s/JGXIXJQX and feel free to check out our FAQs for further help: https://transformcredit.com/faq.

Jade@TransformCredit 

P.S. I am ready to pay $5500 out within 24 hours of your cosigner being approved, but if you don't plan to provide a new cosigner please let me know by replying CANCEL so I can reserve it for someone else

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

interactions.body:
(Borrower GT Default Email) [RE:Need help finding a cosigner?] Hi Jennifer, 

Here at Transform Credit, we only offer cosigner loans. Providing a cosigner means we're able to lend to you, even if your credit score is below 500. If your cosigner trusts you then we will too. Your cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor, colleague or even your in-laws!) who:

- Is a US resident
- Is over 23 
- Has a credit score of more than 700
- Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time.
- Trusts you and will pay if you do not 
- Will give correct contact details and sign the agreement

More information about our cosigner requirements can be found here: https://transformcredit.com/faq. Send this link to your cosigner so they can register online in 2 minutes: https://tcrdt.com/s/F0JLGJF8

If you are not able to find a cosigner, please let me know by responding to this email with "CANCEL". You can reapply at any time by visiting: https://transformcredit.com

Thanks,
Transform Credit

[Affordability Confirmation] To Luis Barillas,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Information provided to Transform Credit by you:

Borrower: Luis Barillas
IP: 146.75.164.1
DateTime (UTC): 02-15-2025
Stated Monthly Income: Self Employed $1500
Rent: $500
Bills: $250
Other Expenses: $195
Your Credit Commitments: $0
Transform Credit Repayment: $237.620000
To be safe: $50
Total available after expenditure and this loan repayment: $267.380000


Yours sincerely
Transform credit Applications Dept

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 SMS) Hi Luis, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, and we should too! They can be ANYONE who is a US resident, has 750+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! You'll find tips here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/5806J3PZ - we'd love your loan to add to the +$100 million we've already paid out. If you still can't find a cosigner, please respond CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Jade, Transform Credit

interactions.label: Message from MessageFactoryBot — BRW Pre-Contractual Information

interactions.body: (AI BW GTQs - If I had GT wouldn't need loan SMS) Hi Luis, our loans may be more expensive than bank loans, but we've been able to help thousands of people who've been unable to borrow from their bank. Our interest rate can be 25 times cheaper than a payday loan, and is often comparable to a credit card. Whilst a suitable cosigner may be able to lend you the money directly, you wouldn't benefit from us reporting your on-time and in-full repayments back to Experian, which would pave the way for better financial opportunities in the future. Reply CANCEL to unsubscribe. Thanks, Transform Credit

interactions.label: Message from MessageFactoryBot — INVITE GT BRW SMS DSIT1

interactions.body: Hi Luis,  Thank you for contacting Transform Credit, your message is really important to us.  We offer cosigner loans of $3,000 to $10,000 over 2 to 5 years, depending on how much you will borrow and the state you are located in. Our interest is calculated daily, so any additional payment could save you money in the long run. We recommend all of our customers pay as much as they can afford. You can make your payments before your selected due date and there is no cost for doing so.   You can change your loan amount anytime up to pay-out. Your current loan amount is $3000. To amend your details and change this loan amount, you can use this link: https://transformcredit.com/details?aRef=0625081805343206050325  If you have any other questions, just let us know.  Thanks, Transform Credit

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 SMS) Hi Luis, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, so we should too! They can be ANYONE who has a 700+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Homeowners with slightly lower scores will also have a good chance of approval. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! Find tips here: https://togetherloans.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/AD2E8215 - we'd love to add you to the 40,000 customers we have already helped like you. If you still can't find a cosigner, please reply CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Ben, Together Loans

(AI BW GTQs - Can I get loan without GT SMS) Hi Luis, based on your situation, we require you to provide a cosigner. A cosigner shows us that someone trusts you to pay, and that we should too! This allows us to lend to you even if you've been turned down elsewhere. If you could get a loan elsewhere without a cosigner, we might not be the right choice for you. If you have a suitable cosigner send them this link, they can register online in 2 minutes: https://tcrdt.com/s/AD2E8215 Reply CANCEL to unsubscribe. Thanks, Together Loans

Hi Luis, we offer loans between $3,000 and $10,000 over 2 to 5 years, depending on how much you borrow and the state you live in. It’s important to note that our interest is calculated daily, so you can settle early, make a large, one-off overpayment or regular overpayments, which will reduce your balance and save you money in the long run. You can amend your details or change your loan amount here: https://tcrdt.com/s/GK0ZPGNU We're a cosigner-based lender, meaning all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them. A cosigner is a great sign that someone trusts you, and that we should too regardless of your credit history! A cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor or even a colleague) who is a US resident, has a 700+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time - someone who owns their home is much more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score as homeownership is a strong indicator of financial responsibility. Thanks, Together Loans

[Affordability Confirmation] To Kelley VanderWiele,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

interactions.body:
[Affordability Confirmation] To Porfilio Silva,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Information provided to Transform Credit by you:

Borrower: Porfilio Silva
IP: 67.198.73.177
DateTime (UTC): 06-20-2025
Stated Monthly Income: Retired $9700
Rent: $0
Bills: $300
Other Expenses: $500
Your Credit Commitments: $0
Transform Credit Repayment: $237.620000
To be safe: $50
Total available after expenditure and this loan repayment: $8612.380000

[Affordability Confirmation] To Janice RINCHE,

interactions.body:
(Borrower GT Rule 1 Email) [RE:You asked us to help with $3000 - and we can!] Hi Rudolph, 

Thanks for reaching out, we understand that it can seem difficult to find a cosigner at first. Don't worry though, we help people like you every day!

We're a cosigner lender, all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them. A cosigner is a great sign that someone trusts you, and that we should too regardless of your credit history! If your cosigner trusts you, then we will.

A cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor or even a colleague) who is a US resident, has a 750+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time - someone who owns their home or pays a mortgage is much more likely to be accepted. Remember, as long as you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to make a payment! You might find some useful tips on how to approach finding or speaking to a potential cosigner here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans

When you have found someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/WWEFFSQL - we'd love for your loan to add to the $25million we've already paid out to people just like you. If you still find that you're not able to find a cosigner, please respond to this email with CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else.

Thanks, 
Jade@Transform Credit

Hi rose,
Thank you for reaching out. We understand your concerns and I want to reassure you that we are a legitimate lender, incorporated in Delaware and based primarily out of Chicago. We have been lending for over 7 years, across 22 different states, all of which require licensing. You can find this information on our website: https://togetherloans.com/Licenses. We are also registered with Nationwide Multistate Licensing System (NMLS), with license number 1905055. We have annual state audits in order to maintain our licenses, and if there were any significant issues, we would be unable to lend. We are currently applying for accreditation with the BBB which means we will be able to point customers to review our services there also, giving us a real rating. BBB has also investigated our business and was satisfied with our responses, which have been published on our page. I hope this information provides you with the peace of mind needed to move forward with us. Please let us know if you have any further questions or concerns.
Thanks,
Together Loans

interactions.body:
[Your Together Loans Loan Application : 0609083329021905210723] Hi rose,

We pay the funds out to you rather than the borrower for 3 key reasons. These are:

1) To verify your identity and prevent identity fraud from being committed against you, as you have to provide us with an account that is active, valid, in your name and capable of ACH payments that we pay the funds into. 
2) To make sure that you are fully aware of the loan and provide you with an opportunity to return to the funds to us, if you are unsure on whether this financial responsibility is something you want to continue with.
3) By transferring the funds to you to transfer to the borrower, you're confirming your roles and responsibilities on this loan. Additionally, because you agree to make any payments that the borrower does not, we can then use these bank details as a backup payment method if the account goes past due. 

Being a cosigner is a serious financial commitment and it is important that any cosigner fully understands their role and the responsibilities, and obligations that come with becoming a co-signer. We believe that paying the funds out to the co-signer allows them to confirm their understanding and make a fully informed decision, before committing to these responsibilities.  

If you have any other questions, please let me know. 

Thanks, 
Divya@Together Loans

(GT - Email - settling loan) [RE:There is a Pending ACH on your Account - 120388CAPS] Hi Kenneth,
 
Your current balance is $4782.04.  
 
To pay off your loan, please follow: https://tcrdt.com/s/CP56WCMY

We will need to receive the funds within 5 working days to honor this figure. After 5 working days, the balance you need to pay will update to include the additional daily accrued interest. This payoff figure also excludes any other changes to the balance that may occur, aside from accrued interest, such as a returned payment.
 
Thanks,
TransformCredit

(AI GT Confirming Payment - Pending payment - GT DD - Arrears Email) [RE: There is a Pending ACH on your Account - 120388CAPS] Hi Kenneth,

There is a pending payment of $195.80, from your bank account. ACH payments can take up to 5 days to clear, at which point the payment will show on your account.

Will this payment be successful? This loan is currently 16 days past due, so if this payment isn't successful it's crucial the account is brought current immediately, to prevent extra interest accruing and avoid further escalation.

You can make a payment immediately here: https://tcrdt.com/s/DU3PCHBU or pay late here: https://tcrdt.com/s/NCWG5TDY

Thanks,
Mia, Transform Credit

(GT - Email - balance and statement of account) [RE:There is a Pending ACH on your Account - 120388CAPS] Hi Kenneth,
 
Your balance as of today is $4782.04. Please bear in mind that we charge our interest daily against the balance, therefore this amount will change on a daily basis.
 
You can access your statement of account any time via this link: https://tcrdt.com/s/906QEZBS
 
If you are looking to settle your loan, please reply  with "settle my loan"
 
Thanks,
TransformCredit

[victoriahall] spk_0: Please leave your message for
spk_1: 619-88.

[Your TransformCredit Loan : 120388CAPS] Hi Kenneth,

To settle your loan, download our App https://tcrdt.com/s/N8MP0EPX or go online: https://tcrdt.com/s/CP56WCMY If the pending payment is going to clear, you can deduct that amount.

Funds must be received within five working days to honour the settlement amount and waive off any interest accumulated during this time frame. Otherwise, you will be charged for the account's interest accumulated during the time frame. 

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out. We're here to assist you.

Thanks,
Transform Credit

spk_1: Hi Derek, this is Dyer with Together
spk_0: Loangether
spk_1: loan.
spk_0: Oh hi, hi.

spk_1: And the last four of your social?
spk_0: 3827.
spk_1: Alright, I'm gonna try to be very fast with this. I just need to verify some information. Can you please confirm your phone number?
spk_0: 088853418.
spk_1: Your email
spk_0: address is Derek Bartles26@gmail.com.
spk_1: Your, um, house address and
spk_0: apartment number if any 719. Person Street, Lancaster, Wisconsin 53813.
spk_1: Got it. So did you read the initial disclosure statement terms and conditions on the website before electronically signing? We'll be lending you $32,000 I mean $3250 which is $30,250 over the over 36 months with monthly payments of $148.86. Your total repayable will be $5,358.96. Your first Payment will be collected exactly 30 days after your loan is paid out. Then on the same day of every month, we recommend you change this to match the day you get. Paid we will send you a link to do this after your loan is paid out, OK? So are you confident you can make the monthly repayments amount on time and in full and still have enough Money left to live up? Are there any expected changes to your circumstances that could affect your ability to make the loan repayments? Is there any expected changes to your circumstances I could expect, OK, that could affect your ability to make the loan Repayment. OK, so this is how say yes or no.
spk_0: What's that? I said no for the first question, and I thought you asked another question.
spk_1: Oh no, no, I didn't have another question. The first question I was saying, I'm sorry if I was being fast and so I just said that are there any expected changes to your circumstances that could affect your ability to make the loan Repayment. Got it. So how payments will be collected? You have provided two payments method for Collection. We'll always attempt your checking account first. If this fails, we'll attempt your card. If both your payments fail, we'll immediately attempt Payment from Christine. Do you understand? Agree to this?
spk_0: Yes.

Hi Gavin, the 1st loan payment was attempted from your payment methods but was unsuccessful. This is concerning; we paid out the loan a month ago; as you stated, you could afford the monthly payments and were able to make the repayment in full and on time. Per the contract you signed and reiterated on the pre-recorded phone call. You had 30 days to budget yourself to ensure this payment would be successful. Therefore, we need you to make the missing payment of $316.63 immediately athttps://tcrdt.com/s/EVEIU4RQ in the meantime, we will be contacting and collecting from Raif per TheIr separate agreement to avoid this loan accumulating extra interest and risking the full balance OF $8267.96 being due, and us seeking a judgment, apart from us reporting you both as delinquent to the credit bureau. Thanks, Berginie, Head of Collections Together Loans

[Your Transform Credit Loan Application Ref: 0602070234091110162905] Hello Anthony,

Thank you for starting your Transform Credit loan application. 

Below is a link where you can view/download our free Credit Education Program. You're not required to do anything with this in order to proceed with your application, but we recommend reviewing the content as you may find it helpful.

https://transformcredit.com/credit-education-program?state=ca

Transform Credit Inc.

[Affordability Confirmation] To Anthony Chargualaf,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Information provided to Transform Credit by you:

Borrower: Anthony Chargualaf
IP: 47.143.49.80
DateTime (UTC): 06-02-2025
Stated Monthly Income: Full Time Employed $6230
Rent: $3542
Bills: $300
Other Expenses: $476
Your Credit Commitments: $59
Transform Credit Repayment: $343.540000
To be safe: $50
Total available after expenditure and this loan repayment: $1459.460000


Yours sincerely
Transform credit Applications Dept

[Affordability Confirmation] To Anthony Chargualaf,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Information provided to Transform Credit by you:

Borrower: Anthony Chargualaf
IP: 97.205.219.85
DateTime (UTC): 11-24-2025
Stated Monthly Income: Full Time Employed $6160
Rent: $575.00
Bills: $200.00
Other Expenses: $500.00
Your Credit Commitments: $100.00
Transform Credit Repayment: $289.07

Transform credit Applications Dept

[Your TransformCredit Loan Application : 0602070234091110162905] Hello Anthony, 

Thank you for your contact. 

I'm sorry, but Cheryl wasn't a suitable cosigner at this time. We have a responsibility to make sure that cosigning your loan is something that they would be able to financially support and based on the information provided we don't feel that this is the case for them. We have sent them an email explaining the reason behind this decision. Don't worry though - the most important thing is we've already accepted your application and want to help you get the money you need.

You just need to find someone else to be your cosigner instead. As soon as you've found someone new, we'll check that the payments are affordable for you both and will then arrange to pay out the loan. When someone becomes a cosigner, it will be up to them to make the loan payments if you did not. Looking at their credit history, allows us to see if they've kept up with their own bills in the past. This helps us to decide if they would be suitable cosigners. A good cosigner has:

- A credit score of 750+
- A good history of paying their bills on time
- Homeowners (not tenants) are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time

To add a new cosigner please use this link: https://tcrdt.com/s/VGJTKQZW

Thank you, 
Transform Credit

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is funded. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be canceled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

Information provided to Together Loans by you:

Borrower: Joseph Burgess
IP: 169.254.129.1
DateTime (UTC): 03-17-2026
Stated Monthly Income: Full Time Employed $4900
Rent: $0.00
Bills: $0.00
Other Expenses: $1800.00
Your Credit Commitments: $0.00
Together Loans Repayment: $183.54
To be safe: $50.00
Total available after expenditure and this loan repayment: $2866.46


Yours sincerely
Together Loans Applications Dept

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled.
